values [[603], [Void Knights' Outpost clothes delivery], [0], [64], [2], [8610], [8610], [8607], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [32925, 5], None, None, None, None, None, None, [57838], [The Void Knights have ordered some comfortable clothes to wear when they're not on duty but it's a long way to go for our longboats. Will pay well for delivery.
- Yrsa]]		 [[603], [Void Knights' Outpost clothes delivery], [0], [64], [8610], [8610], [8607], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [32925, 5], None, None, None, None, None, None, [57838], [The Void Knights have ordered some comfortable clothes to wear when they're not on duty but it's a long way to go for our longboats. Will pay well for delivery.
- Yrsa]]

values [[604], [Rellekka arrowtip delivery], [0], [64], [2], [8610], [8607], [8610], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [32924, 5], None, None, None, None, None, None, [57834], [I've ordered several crates of quality arrowtips from the outerlanders that call themselves Void Knights. I need someone to collect them for me.
- Sigli the Huntsman]]		 [[604], [Rellekka arrowtip delivery], [0], [64], [8610], [8607], [8610], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [32924, 5], None, None, None, None, None, None, [57834], [I've ordered several crates of quality arrowtips from the outerlanders that call themselves Void Knights. I need someone to collect them for me.
- Sigli the Huntsman]]

- GPDT]]

- Nia]]		 [[362], [Port Tyras fabric delivery], [0], [70], [8616], [8616], [8612], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [32696, 6], None, None, None, None, None, None, [57831], [I've got a shipment of fabric that's gone to the wrong port. Apparently they didn't think Prifddinas actually existed so they just left it at Port Tyras. Please could someone go and pick it up for me?
- Nia]]

I need someone to collect me some osprey feathers so I can make myself some more. I hear there are some in the Lumbridge Basin.
- Parleying Preston]]

values [[467], [Brimhaven tern bounty], [1], [30], [0], [8595], [8595], [8595], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [15228], [15229], [32823], [3], [3], [57781], [Seems that barely anyone wants to spend a night in my dormitory any more. - Ishmael]]		 [[497], [Ruins of Unkah butterfly ray bounty], [1], [48], [8606], [8606], [8606], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [15216], [15217], [32820], [4], [2], [57798], [I need butterfly ray fins. - Taiman]]		 [[499], [Ruins of Unkah albatross bounty], [1], [55], [8606], [8606], [8606], None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, None, [15224], [15225], [32845], [1], [10], [57775], [They call the albatross lucky, and I reckon like a rabbit's foot, the luck lies in a single piece.
